column2: Initial repository export generated by Get_Repositories.py v1.0.0
Repository data read from a GitHub organization and filtered automatically by visibility, archive status, and activity cutoff.
Two-stage process: stage 1 automated export by script; stage 2 optional manual filtering if repository-side tags or metadata are missing.
Excel review, manual repository qualification, and follow-on automation workflows that consume repository lists.
Repository name in the selected GitHub organization.
Timestamp of the latest push reported by GitHub.
Normalized repository visibility status after API readout.
Archive flag returned by GitHub for the repository.
Unique repository visitors in the last 14 days.
Unique repository cloners in the last 14 days.
Total repository page views in the last 14 days.
Traffic readout result, for example OK or an API access message.
